title: Marvel's X-Men movie: cast rumors and everything we know so far about MCU's new mutant-starring comic book film
summary: More recently, Feige hinted (see the X/Twitter post above) that the new X-Men movie will be the first film to arrive after the sixth Avengers installment. Predictably, nobody has been confirmed to appear in Marvel's X-Men movie yet.
